name: InMotion Hosting
tagline: Best for business hosting with excellent support
description: InMotion Hosting offers business-grade hosting with excellent US-based support, making it ideal for small to medium businesses.
longDescription: InMotion Hosting targets business users with a feature set that prioritizes reliability, security, and support quality. All support agents are US-based and undergo extensive training — in our testing, InMotion's support was second only to SiteGround in technical competence. The business-oriented plans include features like automatic backups, DDoS protection, and a free dedicated IP on higher tiers. Performance is good with 99.95% uptime and 1.4-second average loads. The main drawbacks are higher starting prices than competitors and a more complex initial setup process that may overwhelm beginners.
pros: Excellent US-based phone and chat support

keyFeatures.name: US-Based Support
keyFeatures.description: All support agents are US-based with extensive training. Phone, chat, and email support 24/7. Consistently rated among the best in independent reviews.

keyFeatures.name: Free Website Migration
keyFeatures.description: Expert team migrates up to 3 websites for free. Includes databases, email accounts, and configuration. Most competitors charge $50-150 per migration.

keyFeatures.name: Marketing Tools
keyFeatures.description: Free advertising credits for Google Ads and Bing Ads included with new accounts. Customer management tools for tracking leads and conversions.

keyFeatures.name: Secure Infrastructure
keyFeatures.description: DDoS protection, automatic backups, malware scanning, and free SSL on all plans. Business-grade security typically reserved for premium hosting tiers.

verdict: InMotion Hosting is the best choice for small to medium businesses that value reliable support and are willing to pay slightly more for it. The US-based support team is consistently excellent, and the business-oriented features are genuinely useful. Beginners may find the setup process overwhelming.

faqs.question: Is InMotion good for business websites?
faqs.answer: Yes, InMotion is specifically designed for business hosting. Plans include features that businesses need: free SSL, automatic backups, DDoS protection, and priority support. The support team is trained to handle business-critical issues, and the 99.95% uptime ensures your site stays online.

faqs.question: How does InMotion's free migration work?
faqs.answer: InMotion's migration team will transfer up to 3 websites for free within 48 hours of your request. This includes files, databases, email accounts, and DNS configuration. The process is handled by their technical team — you just provide credentials and they handle everything.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has tested web hosting services for 7 years.

seoMeta.title: InMotion Hosting Review 2026: 8.5/10 Rating | TrueTopReviews
seoMeta.description: In-depth InMotion review covering business hosting, US support, and pricing. Rated 8.5/10.
